metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_3670
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Analyzing parallel fiber inputs to Purkinje cells, Fig.3A shows that most vGLUT1 puncta overlapped with the punctate contactin-6 staining. Dense contactin-6 puncta were apposed to dendritic mGluR1a of Purkinje cells. These data support a presynaptic localization of contactin-6.

21/6/2017 Pim
- The rationale is:
(1) protein expressed in axons (parallel fibers).
(2) colocalization with pre- and postsynaptic marker proteins.
(3) localization in synaptosomal preparations.
- Although superresolution data is not presented, based on cell type expression and colocalization data the authors conclude: "Col-lectively, these results indicate that NB-3 is localized presynaptically at glutamatergic synapses.". Experimental description: "Mice were anesthetized with pentobarbital and transcardially
perfused"
